review_basis: Direct source inspection of the repaired probe surface and residual guard.
Direct source inspection confirmed `SteeringMediaService` intentionally skips DISARMED image publication via `skip_disarmed`.

Reviewed `board-smoke-evidence.json` showing the board parameter-store test passed, build/upload succeeded, DISARMED no-motion snapshots kept actuator raw/applied outputs at zero, motor-disabled media capture aligned control/media evidence, and both config snapshots included `BEV_ELEMENT_RASTER {ENABLED:true, WIDTH:320}`.
Updated tasks mark 5.8 and 5.11 complete, closing the prior hardware-only coverage gap.
Previously rerun host-side checks remained available for the repaired source surfaces: residual check, steering media selftest, no-upload build, and host probe compile/run.
